tools.name: Basic Subdomain Discovery
tools.description: Discovers subdomains using subfinder with recursive enumeration and saves results to a file.
tools.command:
subfinder -d {domain} -all -recursive -t 20 -o {domain}_subdomains.txt
echo "Subdomains saved to {domain}_subdomains.txt"

tools.name: Live Subdomain Filtering
tools.description: Filters live subdomains using httpx with polite scanning parameters.
tools.command:
httpx -l {domain}_subdomains.txt -threads 10 -rate-limit 100 -timeout 10 -o {domain}_live_subdomains.txt
echo "Live subdomains saved to {domain}_live_subdomains.txt"

tools.name: Amass Subdomain Enumeration
tools.description: Comprehensive subdomain enumeration using Amass with passive sources.
tools.command:
amass enum -passive -d {domain} -config /opt/amass/config.ini -o {domain}_amass_subdomains.txt
echo "Amass results saved to {domain}_amass_subdomains.txt"

tools.name: DNSGen Wordlist Generation
tools.description: Generate additional subdomains using dnsgen for wordlist-based discovery.
tools.command:
cat {domain}_subdomains.txt | dnsgen - | head -10000 > {domain}_dnsgen_wordlist.txt
subfinder -dL {domain}_dnsgen_wordlist.txt -o {domain}_dnsgen_results.txt
echo "DNSGen results saved to {domain}_dnsgen_results.txt"

tools.name: GetAllUrls (GAU)
tools.description: Fetches known URLs from Wayback Machine, Common Crawl, and AlienVault OTX.
tools.command:
gau {domain} | head -10000 > {domain}_urls.txt
echo "URLs saved to {domain}_urls.txt"

tools.name: Wayback URLs
tools.description: Fetch URLs from the Wayback Machine for a domain.
tools.command:
waybackurls {domain} | head -5000 > {domain}_wayback_urls.txt
echo "Wayback URLs saved to {domain}_wayback_urls.txt"

tools.name: Hakrawler
tools.description: Web crawler designed for gathering URLs and JavaScript file locations.
tools.command:
echo {domain} | hakrawler -depth 2 -plain -usewayback > {domain}_crawled_urls.txt
echo "Crawled URLs saved to {domain}_crawled_urls.txt"

tools.name: Gobuster Directory Scan
tools.description: Fast directory and file brute-forcer written in Go.
tools.command:
gobuster dir -u https://{domain} -w /usr/share/wordlists/dirb/common.txt -t 20 -q -o {domain}_directories.txt
echo "Directory scan results saved to {domain}_directories.txt"

tools.name: Feroxbuster Recursive Scan
tools.description: Fast, simple, recursive content discovery tool written in Rust.
tools.command:
feroxbuster -u https://{domain} -w /usr/share/wordlists/dirb/common.txt -t 20 -C 404,403 -o {domain}_ferox_results.txt
echo "Feroxbuster results saved to {domain}_ferox_results.txt"

tools.name: FFUF Directory Fuzzing
tools.description: Fast web fuzzer written in Go for content discovery.
tools.command:
ffuf -u https://{domain}/FUZZ -w /usr/share/wordlists/dirb/common.txt -t 20 -rate 100 -o {domain}_ffuf_results.json
echo "FFUF results saved to {domain}_ffuf_results.json"

tools.name: Nuclei Exposure Detection
tools.description: Scan for exposed sensitive files and configurations using Nuclei.
tools.command:
nuclei -u https://{domain} -t exposures/ -rate-limit 50 -o {domain}_exposures.txt
echo "Exposure scan results saved to {domain}_exposures.txt"

tools.name: TruffleHog Secret Scanning
tools.description: Search for secrets accidentally committed to repositories.
tools.command:
trufflehog git https://github.com/{domain} --only-verified > {domain}_secrets.txt
echo "Secret scan results saved to {domain}_secrets.txt"

tools.name: FFUF LFI Fuzzing
tools.description: Local File Inclusion testing using FFUF with LFI payloads.
tools.command:
ffuf -u 'https://{domain}/page?file=FUZZ' -w /opt/wordlists/lfi_payloads.txt -t 10 -rate 50 -mc 200 -o {domain}_lfi_results.json
echo "LFI fuzzing results saved to {domain}_lfi_results.json"

tools.name: Corsy CORS Scanner
tools.description: CORS misconfiguration scanner.
tools.command:
python3 /opt/tools/Corsy/corsy.py -u https://{domain} -t 20 -o {domain}_cors_results.txt
echo "CORS scan results saved to {domain}_cors_results.txt"

tools.name: WPScan Vulnerability Scanner
tools.description: WordPress Security Scanner that identifies vulnerabilities.
tools.command:
wpscan --url https://{domain} --enumerate p,t,u --plugins-detection aggressive --api-token YOUR_API_TOKEN -o {domain}_wpscan.json
echo "WPScan results saved to {domain}_wpscan.json"

tools.name: Nuclei WordPress Templates
tools.description: WordPress-specific vulnerability scanning using Nuclei.
tools.command:
nuclei -u https://{domain} -t wordpress/ -rate-limit 50 -o {domain}_wp_nuclei.txt
echo "WordPress Nuclei scan results saved to {domain}_wp_nuclei.txt"

tools.name: Nmap Basic Port Scan
tools.description: Basic port scan with service detection and common scripts.
tools.command:
nmap -sV -sC -T4 {domain} -oA {domain}_nmap_basic
echo "Nmap basic scan results saved to {domain}_nmap_basic.*"

tools.name: Nmap Full Port Scan
tools.description: Comprehensive scan of all 65535 ports.
tools.command:
nmap -p- -T4 {domain} -oA {domain}_nmap_full
echo "Nmap full port scan results saved to {domain}_nmap_full.*"

tools.name: Masscan Fast Port Scan
tools.description: Ultra-fast port scanner for large-scale scanning.
tools.command:
masscan -p1-65535 {domain} --rate=1000 -oX {domain}_masscan.xml
echo "Masscan results saved to {domain}_masscan.xml"

tools.name: Nmap NSE Scripts
tools.description: Service enumeration using Nmap NSE scripts.
tools.command:
nmap -sV --script=default,discovery,safe {domain} -oA {domain}_nse_enum
echo "NSE enumeration results saved to {domain}_nse_enum.*"

tools.name: Nuclei Service Detection
tools.description: Service-specific vulnerability scanning using Nuclei.
tools.command:
nuclei -u https://{domain} -t technologies/ -rate-limit 50 -o {domain}_service_detection.txt
echo "Service detection results saved to {domain}_service_detection.txt"

tools.name: Arjun Parameter Discovery
tools.description: HTTP parameter discovery suite.
tools.command:
arjun -u https://{domain} -w /opt/wordlists/parameters.txt -t 20 -o {domain}_parameters.txt
echo "Parameter discovery results saved to {domain}_parameters.txt"

tools.name: FFUF Parameter Fuzzing
tools.description: Parameter fuzzing using FFUF with common parameter wordlists.
tools.command:
ffuf -u 'https://{domain}/?FUZZ=test' -w /opt/wordlists/parameters.txt -t 20 -rate 100 -mc 200 -o {domain}_param_fuzz.json
echo "Parameter fuzzing results saved to {domain}_param_fuzz.json"

tools.name: LinkFinder
tools.description: Python script to discover endpoints in JavaScript files.
tools.command:
python3 /opt/tools/LinkFinder/linkfinder.py -i https://{domain} -d -o {domain}_js_endpoints.html
echo "JavaScript endpoints saved to {domain}_js_endpoints.html"

tools.name: GetJS
tools.description: Tool to extract all JavaScript files from a domain.
tools.command:
getjs --url https://{domain} --output {domain}_js_files.txt
echo "JavaScript files saved to {domain}_js_files.txt"

tools.name: Nuclei API Templates
tools.description: API-specific vulnerability scanning using Nuclei.
tools.command:
nuclei -u https://{domain} -t http/misconfiguration/,http/vulnerabilities/ -rate-limit 50 -o {domain}_api_scan.txt
echo "API scan results saved to {domain}_api_scan.txt"

tools.name: FFUF API Endpoint Discovery
tools.description: API endpoint discovery using common API patterns.
tools.command:
ffuf -u 'https://{domain}/api/FUZZ' -w /opt/wordlists/api_endpoints.txt -t 20 -rate 100 -mc 200,201,204 -o {domain}_api_endpoints.json
echo "API endpoint discovery results saved to {domain}_api_endpoints.json"

tools.name: MobSF API Scan
tools.description: Mobile Security Framework API scanning.
tools.command:
# Note: Requires MobSF setup and APK/IPA file
echo "Mobile app security testing requires MobSF framework setup"
echo "Upload your APK/IPA file to MobSF at http://localhost:8000"

tools.name: S3 Bucket Scanner
tools.description: Scan for misconfigured S3 buckets related to the domain.
tools.command:
python3 /opt/tools/S3Scanner/s3scanner.py -d {domain} -o {domain}_s3_buckets.txt
echo "S3 bucket scan results saved to {domain}_s3_buckets.txt"

tools.name: Nuclei Cloud Templates
tools.description: Cloud-specific misconfigurations using Nuclei.
tools.command:
nuclei -u https://{domain} -t cloud/ -rate-limit 50 -o {domain}_cloud_scan.txt
echo "Cloud security scan results saved to {domain}_cloud_scan.txt"

tools.name: Nuclei Full Scan
tools.description: Comprehensive vulnerability scan using all Nuclei templates.
tools.command:
nuclei -u https://{domain} -t cves/,vulnerabilities/,misconfiguration/ -rate-limit 50 -o {domain}_vuln_scan.txt
echo "Vulnerability scan results saved to {domain}_vuln_scan.txt"

tools.name: Nikto Web Scanner
tools.description: Web server scanner for dangerous files and vulnerabilities.
tools.command:
nikto -h https://{domain} -Format txt -output {domain}_nikto.txt
echo "Nikto scan results saved to {domain}_nikto.txt"

tools.name: SQLMap Crawl & Test
tools.description: Crawl the site and test for SQL injection vulnerabilities.
tools.command:
sqlmap -u https://{domain} --crawl=2 --batch --random-agent --level=2 --risk=2 -o {domain}_sqlmap
echo "SQLMap results saved to {domain}_sqlmap/"
